hypotheses.text: Turquoise-core genes (top 200-500 by kME) are significantly enriched for ECM/structural remodeling pathways that were diluted in whole-module ORA
hypotheses.rationale: Round 1 ORA found nothing in turquoise because 1300+ genes created statistical noise; core-only reduces universe and increases signal-to-noise

hypotheses.text: kME-ranked GSEA on turquoise module reveals cardiac adaptation pathways (calcium handling, energy metabolism, oxidative phosphorylation) that ORA missed due to binary threshold
hypotheses.rationale: GSEA uses continuous ranking, not arbitrary significance cutoff; more sensitive for large modules

hypotheses.text: ECM score (computed from collagen/ECM gene sets) correlates with turquoise or brown module eigengene, confirming ECM remodeling as convergent cardiac adaptation signal
hypotheses.rationale: Brown had atrium_shared_up overlap; ECM genes may drive brown module identity

hypotheses.text: Signed network analysis confirms turquoise and brown module integrity: modules survive signed network construction and hub genes remain consistent
hypotheses.rationale: Round 1 used unsigned network; Feynman flagged that up/down genes merged could be artifact

hypotheses.text: NULL: turquoise-core genes show no significant enrichment, GSEA reveals no new pathways, and signed network changes module structure
hypotheses.rationale: Must report null if core ORA and GSEA both fail

hypotheses.text: Brown-core genes (top kME) are enriched for energy metabolism or mitochondrial pathways distinct from turquoise
hypotheses.rationale: Brown correlated positively with high_heart_rate; different biology from turquoise

key_uncertainty: ECM score requires defining a gene list from literature or existing gene sets; no standard ECM scoring method exists in current data. Need to build one from collagen genes (Col1a1, Col3a1, Postn, etc.) or use existing MSigDB C2REACTOME gene sets.

hypotheses.text: Turquoise 核心基因（按 kME 排序前 200-500 个）显著富集 ECM/结构重塑通路，在全模块 ORA 中被稀释
hypotheses.rationale: 第一轮 ORA 在 turquoise 中无结果，因 1300+ 基因造成统计噪音；核心分析减少 universe 并提高信噪比

hypotheses.text: kME 排序 GSEA 揭示心脏适应通路（钙离子处理、能量代谢、氧化磷酸化），ORA 因二元阈值遗漏
hypotheses.rationale: GSEA 使用连续排序，不用显著性截断；对大模块更敏感

hypotheses.text: ECM 评分（从胶原/ECM 基因集计算）与 turquoise 或 brown 模块 eigengene 相关，确认 ECM 重塑为趋同心脏适应信号
hypotheses.rationale: Brown 与 atrium_shared_up 重叠；ECM 基因可能驱动 brown 模块身份

hypotheses.text: Signed network 分析确认 turquoise 和 brown 模块完整性：模块在 signed network 中存活且 hub 基因一致
hypotheses.rationale: 第一轮用 unsigned network；Feynman 指出上调/下调基因合并可能是假象

hypotheses.text: 零假设：核心 ORA 无显著富集，GSEA 无新通路，signed network 改变模块结构
hypotheses.rationale: 如果核心 ORA 和 GSEA 都失败，必须报告零结果

hypotheses.text: Brown 核心基因富集能量代谢或线粒体通路，与 turquoise 不同
hypotheses.rationale: Brown 与高心率正相关；与 turquoise 不同的生物学

cn.key_uncertainty: ECM 评分需要从文献或现有基因集定义基因列表；当前数据无标准 ECM 评分方法。需从胶原基因（Col1a1, Col3a1, Postn 等）或 MSigDB C2REACTOME 基因集构建。
